name: seedling
description: Early-stage ideas and rough notes. These posts are exploratory and may be incomplete, but they capture the spark of a thought worth developing.

name: budding
description: Posts that have grown past the initial idea. They have clearer structure and stronger arguments, but are still being refined.

name: evergreen
description: Mature, well-developed posts. These have been revisited and polished over time and represent my most considered thinking.
